---
name: "Report an error"
about: "Factual mistake, broken link, or outdated information on an existing page"
title: "Error: [page path]"
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Which page has the error?

<!-- e.g. wiki-ru/concepts/mining.md or the Quartz URL https://wiki.21ideas.org/ru/concepts/mining -->

## What is wrong?

<!-- Describe the error clearly: wrong fact, broken wikilink, outdated information, formatting issue, etc. -->

## What should it say instead?

<!-- If you know the correct information, paste it here. If it's a broken link, suggest the correct target if known. -->

## Source

<!-- If you have a URL that supports the correction, paste it here.
     The wiki only uses 21ideas.org material as sources — corrections also need to be grounded there. -->
